name: Even Better Posters
overview: Adds configurable Btttr.cc poster cards to Jellyfin.
description: This plugin adds Btttr.cc as a configurable Remote Image Provider in Jellyfin for movies and TV series. Automatic fetching is disabled by default and can be enabled from the plugin settings.

versions.changelog: Personal build: disabled automatic Btttr poster fetching by default and added a plugin setting to enable it.
